tech_news.title: Smart lock maker Level has been gutted and its founders are out - The Verge
tech_news.description: A source tells The Verge that Assa Abloy has laid off the majority of Level Home’s staff and is folding it into Kwikset. Assa Abloy says it will continue to develop and support Level locks.
